steps.title: Locate the exception
steps.content: The passage says many hyperpop artists follow Maya Lane's model, but Valeria Sanz adds Latin rhythms to the hyperpop sound. She changes the style while remaining within it.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A says some recordings reject the model outright, which the passage never says. Choice B invents a lack of influence from Spotify artists. Choice D reverses the relationship by claiming Sanz inspired established artists. The remaining choice states that her music diverges from typical hyperpop without abandoning it. The answer is C.
